title: Upstake - Digital Marketing
description:
Hey everyone !

Upstake is a digital marketing website that offers a variety of services including E-Commerce, SEO, Website Design, and Social Media Marketing.

The design is my interpretation of how a digital marketing website should look.

Let me know what you guys think!
